prompt: A clean minimalist tech logo composition on a light gray background, wide horizontal layout. On the left, show a stacked cluster of 4 overlapping Microsoft Office-style app icons with soft gradients, rounded corners, subtle depth, and glossy modern vector shading. The front icon is a large blue square tile with a smaller raised blue panel containing a bold white capital P. Behind and slightly above it, place an orange presentation icon with a white pie-chart symbol. Behind the blue icon to the right, place a white document page icon with a folded blue corner and 4 horizontal blue text lines. At the back on the right, place a green spreadsheet icon with a white grid. Arrange the 4 icons so they overlap tightly and read as a unified hybrid Office app mark. On the right side, place the product name in a clean sans-serif font: small black text reading Microsoft above a large multicolor wordmark reading PowerWordEx. Color the word in segmented Microsoft-style hues: warm orange-red for Power, deep blue for Word, and teal-green for Ex. Center the whole composition vertically, keep generous whitespace, and render it as polished corporate branding mockup, crisp vector illustration, soft shadowing, no extra objects.
